samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Design a module for pulse detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </input>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="s_idle">Idle state.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s1">State 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s2">State 2.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s3">State 3.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic">State register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <always>
            <sequential>
                <clocked id="clk" type="posedge">State update.</clocked>
                <reset id="rst_n" type="negedge">Reset condition.</reset>
                <if>
                    <condition id="state == s_idle">Idle state condition.</condition>
                    <then>
                        <sequential>
                            <if>
                                <condition id="data_in == 0">Data input is 0.</condition>
                                <then>
                                    <assign id="state = s1">Transition to state 1.</assign>
                                </then>
                                <else>
                                    <assign id="state = s_idle">Stay in idle state.</assign>
                                </else>
                            </if>
                        </sequential>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <sequential>
                            <if>
                                <condition id="state == s1">State 1 condition.</condition>
                                <then>
                                    <sequential>
                                        <if>
                                            <condition id="data_in == 1">Data input is 1.</condition>
                                            <then>
                                                <assign id="state = s2">Transition to state 2.</assign>
                                            </then>
                                            <else>
                                                <assign id="state = s1">Stay in state 1.</assign>
                                            </else>
                                        </if>
                                    </sequential>
                                </then>
                                <else>
                                    <sequential>
                                        <if>
                                            <condition id="data_in == 0">Data input is 0.</condition>
                                            <then>
                                                <assign id="state = s1">Transition to state 1.</assign>
                                            </then>
                                            <else>
                                                <assign id="state = s2">Transition to state 2.</assign>
                                            </else>
                                        </if>
                                    </sequential>
                                </else>
                            </if>
                        </sequential>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </sequential>
        </always>
        <always>
            <combinational>
                <if>
                    <condition id="state == s2">State 2 condition.</condition>
                    <then>
                        <assign id="data_out = 1">Set data output to 1.</assign>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <assign id="data_out = 0">Set data output to 0.</assign>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </combinational>
        </always>
    </implementation>
</module>
